## Claims

1. Add gar_overnight classification using only sleep-measured signals (RHR, HRV, sleep metrics)
2. Explicitly flag daily-average signals (Body Battery, Stress) as not pre-run valid
3. Update documentation with signal timing and readiness interpretation guide
4. Existing tests were preserved and passed. [Test diff](https://github.com/ImmortalDemonGod/bio-systems-engineering/pull/wellness-dual-signal/files), [CI run](https://github.com/ImmortalDemonGod/bio-systems-engineering/actions/runs/local).

### Class E (Intent Alignment)

- **Requirement:** Correct the common Garmin/Whoop misconception by separating "overnight readiness" from "end-of-day fatigue".
- **Requirement:** Ensure the briefing tool has access to a pre-run valid signal for autonomous decision support.

### Class F (Provenance)

**Claim 4:** Dual G/A/R signal logic follows the project's stateless functional pattern. Core library functions were verified via existing unit tests which continue to pass.
